creator: xistence@0x58.com
text:
My bad, forgot to bring the interface up.

Here's updated reporting:

root@vmbeast:/usr/home/xistence/ # ifconfig wlan0 up
root@vmbeast:/usr/home/xistence/ # wlandebug scan
net.wlan.0.debug: 0x0 => 0x200000<scan>
root@vmbeast:/usr/home/xistence/ # ifconfig wlan0 scan
root@vmbeast:/usr/home/xistence/ # ifconfig wlan0 list scan
